allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe manage.py shell -c "from login.models import Usuario; users = list\(Usuario.objects.filter\(last_name__icontains='romendez'\) | Usuario.objects.filter\(email__icontains='romendez'\)\); print\([\(u.pk, u.email, u.first_name, u.last_name, u.rol\) for u in users]\)")
